room.caption: [71] The very top.

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sPitfallSign stringToShow="Oddly enough, falling back down will cause death. Please use the door to the left to return to the Lava Cave. It's best if you don't question this logic." signSize=3
bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=3024 newMapY=384 toRoom=rMain_64 colorChange=1
sprite_index=sWarpGateStand bShowArrow=false exitType=0 newMapX=32 newMapY=288 toRoom=rLavaCaveA y+=32
